# Final Report Template

> **Instructions for agent:** Fill in every section using data from:
> - ACHIEVABILITY_MAP (Step 7)
> - REVIEW_ISSUES (Step 6)
> - PHASE_LOG (Step 5)
> - BASELINE test count (Step 5 pre-flight)
> Save completed file as `docs/final-report-<feature-name>.md`.

---
